zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley於1271年6月20日出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根卡迪福時，他的父親Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby32歲，母親Alianore de Bohun23歲。他於1301年與Hawise de Muscegros在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年8月27日在法國加斯可享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley于1271年6月20日出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根卡迪福时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby32岁，母亲Alianore de Bohun23岁。他于1301年与Hawise de Muscegros在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年8月27日在法国加斯可享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley was born on 20 June 1271, in Cardiff, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, was 32 and his mother, Alianore de Bohun, was 23. He married Hawise de Muscegros in 1301, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 August 1312, in Gascogne, France, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley est né le 20 juin 1271, à Cardiff, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alianore de Bohun, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Muscegros en 1301, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 août 1312, à Gascogne, France, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley am 20. Juni 1271 in Cardiff, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby 32 und seine Mutter Alianore de Bohun 23. Er hat 1301 in Staffordshire, England Hawise de Muscegros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1312 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Gascogne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley è nato il il 20 giugno 1271 nel Cardiff, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alianore de Bohun, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Muscegros nel 1301, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1312, nel Gascogne, Francia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartleyが1271年6月20日にウェールズグラモーガンカーディッフで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derbyは32歳，母Alianore de Bohunは23歳であった。1301年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでHawise de Muscegrosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年8月27日にフランスガスコグンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley(이)가 1271년 6월 20일 웨일스 글램르건 카디프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore de Bohun(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1301년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Hawise de Muscegros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 8월 27일 프랑스 가스코그니에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.20 June 1271–27 August 1312: 1271 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 20–1312 оны Наймдугаар сарын 27

pt.20 June 1271–27 August 1312: 20 de junho de 1271–27 de agosto de 1312
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley nasceu em 20 de junho de 1271, em Cardiff, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alianore de Bohun, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Muscegros em 1301, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1312, em Gascogne, França, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley родился 20 июня 1271 г. в местности кардифф, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore de Bohun, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Muscegros в 1301 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 августа 1312 г. в местности гаскогн, Франция в возрасте 41 год.

es.20 June 1271–27 August 1312: 20 de junio de 1271–27 de agosto de 1312
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley nació el 20 de junio de 1271, en Cardiff, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alianore de Bohun, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Hawise de Muscegros en 1301, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1312, en Gascogne, Francia, a la edad de 41 años.
